lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: What in the hell is going on down here?

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: New fuel cells? Where are they?

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Ok I get that. Where are they?

lines.speaker: Injured Mechanic
lines.text: ...fuel cells...in both these rooms...need to...get them...on the platforms...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Alright, you’re too injured, I can do that...

lines.speaker: Injured Mechanic
lines.text: WAIT!...*cough cough*...fuel cells...need to be...in the right order...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Of course this wasn’t going to be simple. How do I know what order to put them in?

lines.speaker: Injured Mechanic
lines.text: ...the monitor...in each room...will tell you…what fuel cell shape...is needed...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Fuel cell shape? What does that even mean?

lines.speaker: Injured Mechanic
lines.text: ...just...look at the monitor closely...and it…will tell you *cough cough* ...pull the lever...once they’re placed...

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: And I have to do this for both rooms?

lines.speaker: Macklin
lines.text: Great, he’s passed out. Guess I gotta figure this one out.
